_comment: Club achievements (medals/titles + records). hr (Croatian) source. `archers` = credited archers by 'First Last' (importer resolves to ids): 1=individual, 2+=team, []=club-level. `title` is BOTH the display text AND the stacking key for the grouped UI (Real Madrid / PSG style): rows with the SAME title stack into one count card (e.g. 3x 'Europsko prvenstvo u terenskom streličarstvu'). MEDAL cards = competition name (medal colour shown via `medal`/icon). RECORD cards = record-type label. imageUrl/imageAlt = null for now (user provides stock images later). level: world|european|state|other. type: title|record|other. medal: gold|silver|bronze|null. Sources: WA bio-highlights PDFs (intl medals), archery.hr official records page + news (records), posts.json (domestic Prvenstvo Hrvatske). _flags note any gap/uncertainty.

achievements.imageAlt: Cvijetoslav Zorman, najbolji trener grada Varaždina
achievements.title: Najbolji trener grada Varaždina
Prvenstvo Hrvatske
achievements._flags: Amanda has TWO distinct 2025 national titles (field at Sv. Gera + outdoor target at Varaždin) — two rows, same year/title is intentional (different events).

achievements.title: Svjetski kadetski rekord
achievements._flags: compound 50m/72 arrows, 699, 30 Apr 2017 Čakovec.

achievements.title: Svjetski kadetski rekord
achievements._flags: compound 15-arrow match, 147, 03 Jun 2017 Maribor. NOTE: same shoot also set the European junior 148 record (separate row below).

achievements.title: Svjetski kadetski rekord
achievements._flags: compound indoor, 588. ⚠️ YEAR UNKNOWN — date not on HSS records page nor found online (researched 2026-05-29). Distance per HSS ('dvorana') but exact distance not re-confirmed. Recorded as a record she SET; no claim about current holder.

achievements.title: Svjetski i europski juniorski rekord
achievements._flags: compound indoor, 587. ⚠️ YEAR UNKNOWN — date not found (researched 2026-05-29). World+European junior indoor per HSS page → level=world + alsoLevels=['european'] so it counts in BOTH the world AND European record totals.

achievements.title: Europski juniorski rekord
achievements._flags: compound 15-arrow match, 150/5 (perfect), 12 Aug 2021 Wrocław.

achievements.title: Europski juniorski rekord
achievements._flags: compound 15-arrow match, 148, 03 Jun 2017 Maribor (same shoot as the 147 cadet world record).

achievements.title: Europski juniorski rekord
achievements._flags: compound 50m/72 arrows, 704, 21 May 2019 Antalya.

achievements.title: Državni rekord
achievements._flags: senior women compound 50m, 705, 2025 Kamnik (Veronica's Cup) — from posts.json.

achievements.title: Državni rekord
achievements._flags: women's TEAM national record, 2026 Antalya Euro Champs (with Ivana Mavračić / SK Samobor, non-VŠK — not credited). From posts.json post 7.

achievements.title: Svjetsko prvenstvo u terenskom streličarstvu
achievements._flags: World Field Champion 2016 — the headline honour (WA Field Championships, individual gold).

achievements.title: Prvenstvo Hrvatske
achievements._flags: national champion senior recurve outdoor 2025 (Varaždin).

achievements.title: Prvenstvo Hrvatske
achievements._flags: team gold senior recurve outdoor 2025 (Varaždin).

achievements.title: Prvenstvo Hrvatske
achievements._flags: team gold recurve indoor 2026 (Rijeka).

achievements.title: Prvenstvo Hrvatske
achievements._flags: team gold barebow indoor 2026 (Rijeka).

achievements.title: Prvenstvo Hrvatske
achievements._flags: individual silver recurve indoor 2026 (Rijeka).

achievements.title: Državni rekord
achievements._flags: recurve indoor 18m/60 arrows, 595/600, Nîmes 2022 (where he also won bronze).

achievements.title: Indoor World Series
achievements._flags: IWS U21 Youth Finals gold 2024 (×2 golds that year per WA — recorded as 2 rows).

achievements.title: Prvenstvo Hrvatske
achievements._flags: outdoor senior recurve silver 2025 (Varaždin).

achievements.title: Europsko dvoransko prvenstvo
achievements._flags: U21 team silver Plovdiv 2026 (with Hana Arapović + Ivana Mavračić, non-VŠK — not credited here).

achievements.title: Prvenstvo Hrvatske
achievements._flags: national champion compound U18 indoor 2026 (Rijeka).

achievements.title: Prvenstvo Hrvatske
achievements._flags: national champion kadetkinje outdoor 2025 (Varaždin).

achievements.title: Prvenstvo Hrvatske
achievements._flags: national champion U13/U15 outdoor 2025 (Zadar) — won with a national record.

achievements.title: Državni rekord
achievements._flags: U13/U15 national record set winning the 2025 Zadar title (post 48). Age-class record; not on HSS senior records page.

achievements.title: Europsko juniorsko prvenstvo
achievements._flags: European Youth Championships team gold 2022.

achievements.title: Central European Cup
achievements._flags: ADDED 2026-05-29. CEC Round 1, Lendava SLO 26/04/2026, 1st of 5 (compound). gold=title per user rule. Post 1.

achievements.title: Central European Cup
achievements._flags: ADDED 2026-05-29. CEC 4th leg, Čatež SLO 26/07/2025, U18 Compound gold (top seed, won final). Post 57.

achievements.title: Central European Cup
achievements._flags: ADDED 2026-05-29. CEC Round 1, Lendava SLO 26/04/2026, 1st of 11 (recurve). Post 1.

achievements.title: Central European Cup
achievements._flags: ADDED 2026-05-29. CEC Round 1, Lendava SLO 26/04/2026, 3rd of 6 (compound). Post 1.

achievements.title: Conquest Cup
achievements._flags: ADDED 2026-06-09 per USER (Amanda won again a few days before 2026-06-09 — third consecutive Conquest Cup title). ⚠️ USER-ASSERTED: not separately sourced online. level=other, gold=title.

achievements.title: Conquest Cup
achievements._flags: ADDED 2026-05-29. Amanda WON (defended title), Istanbul, May 2025 (post 62: 'obranila naslov pobjednice Conquest Cupa... drugu godinu zaredom'). gold=title per user rule. ⚠️ Invitational tournament (not WA championship/series) → level='other' so it shows as a title card but does NOT bump the world/EU headline title counts.

achievements.title: Conquest Cup
achievements._flags: ADDED 2026-05-29. The first of the two consecutive wins — post 62 says the 2025 win was 'drugu godinu zaredom' (second year running), so 2024 is the prior title. Year inferred from 'second consecutive'; exact 2024 detail not separately sourced (flag). level='other', gold=title.

achievements._flags: European Youth Championships team bronze 2024 (outdoor).

achievements._flags: recurve U21 individual silver indoor 2026 (Rijeka).

achievements._flags: junior recurve silver outdoor 2025 (Varaždin).

achievements._flags: recurve U18 individual bronze indoor 2026 (Rijeka).

achievements.title: Prvenstvo Hrvatske
achievements._flags: barebow žene team bronze indoor 2026 (Rijeka). Mila Vrbešić was the 3rd team member but DROPPED per user; the team medal still lists Ela + Mija.

achievements.title: Prvenstvo Hrvatske
achievements._flags: ADDED in audit 2026-05-29 (was MISSING). U13/U15 national champion, Zadar 2025 (post 48: 'Prvo mjesto izborio je i Filip Bistričić'). Golds-only rule for domestic youth.

achievements.title: Prvenstvo Hrvatske
achievements._flags: ADDED in audit 2026-05-29 (was MISSING, user said keep). Compound Men 50+, 2. mjesto = silver, indoor 2026 Rijeka (post 6).

achievements.title: Prvenstvo Hrvatske
achievements._flags: ADDED in audit 2026-05-29 (was MISSING — a national TITLE). Barebow, national champion indoor 2026 Rijeka (post 6: 'naslove državnih prvakinja... Mija Mance'; 'izborila prvo mjesto i ponijela naslov državne prvakinje').

achievements.title: Prvenstvo Hrvatske
achievements._flags: ADDED in audit 2026-05-29 (was MISSING). Barebow seniorke, bronze outdoor 2025 Varaždin (post 55 + her bio).

achievements.title: Prvenstvo Hrvatske
achievements._flags: ADDED in audit 2026-05-29 (Zoran had NO rows — big miss). FIELD national champion, barebow senior, Sv. Gera 12/10/2025 (post 46: 'naslov državnog prvaka... seniora golog luka prvo mjesto').

achievements.title: Hrvatski kup u 3D streličarstvu
achievements._flags: ADDED in audit 2026-05-29. 3D national champion, barebow, Bjelovar Hrvatski kup finals 27/09/2025 (post 51: 'osvojio je naslov državnog prvaka'). User confirmed this 3D Cup title counts (2026-05-28). Separate title group from Prvenstvo Hrvatske.

achievements.title: Prvenstvo Hrvatske
achievements._flags: ADDED in audit 2026-05-29. Barebow seniori, bronze outdoor 2025 Varaždin (post 55).
